expected_behavior: Disallowed providers are blocked or safely rerouted with explanation; no request/data is sent to them.
given: A workspace policy allows or disallows model providers based on classification or on-prem requirements.
notes: Scenario-specific validator executed against local synthetic users, tenants, policy, Postgres RLS, OPA, egress, audit, and regression evidence as applicable.
required_evidence: Routing decision, zero disallowed provider calls, explanation and audit refs.
then: Disallowed providers are blocked or safely rerouted with explanation; no request/data is sent to them.
verification_method: Router integration test with local_test and denied external provider fixtures.
when: The model router selects a provider.
